name: L4 — Tempest Apex Tempo
flavor: Faster than you. Twice. Then a third time, just to be sure.
description: Mono-VOLT / mono-STORMCHAIN tempo shell centered on tempest_apex. The L4 mutation raises the per-round extra-action cap from 1 to 2 (charter §22.2 L4), so when a future catalog card or arena modifier hands out GRANT_EXTRA_ACTION, this team can stack two of them in a single round instead of one. SUPPORTING-CARD GAP NOTE: V1 alpha catalog ships zero cards with the GRANT_EXTRA_ACTION op, so the L4 mutation is currently dormant from a pure-catalog match — the team flag is set on battle start, but no in-game event consumes it. This loadout still showcases the 'fast STORMCHAIN VOLT line' archetype, and its L4-readiness is verified by inspecting team mutation state. A future authoring pass (Phase 4h: action-grant cards) will add catalog support that makes this loadout's L4 effect visible in the combat log.
